g.text: : a longing for a brief moment in time. A thought back to days past and time spent with loved ones or friends. What we do
with the brief moment we have in this life. What we decide is important enough to spend it on.
It’s been more than four years since Lenzman’s last project on The North Quarter. During his absence the label has hardly struggled, continuing
to demonstrate its relevance with a roster of diverse and exciting international artists. This has set the stage for his welcome and long
awaited return home with ‘A Little While Longer’.
Written over a space of three months, it tackles the emotions and challenges of a total change of rhythm and routine, frustrated confinement and
overcoming a void in inspiration. In the end it was once again his close family that inspired his creativity and process.
This body of work was brought together by the use of old recordings and found sound, sampling bespoke piano pieces and through collaboration, as
well as forever finding his inner thoughts and feelings as his primary guide. This brief moment in time might feel more like an interlude, but
it's an extended one that shows off Lenzman's signature brand of Hip Hop influenced Drum & Bass music.
Gorgeous 2x12" embossed gatefold sleeve, white vinyl edition of A Little While Longer
A1. Gimmie A Sec feat. Danny Sanchez
Comes with free The NQ sticker.
